title: Department Manager Vacancy at Asian Paints Signature Store - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Asian Paints Signature Store - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Asian Paints Signature Store are looking for an experienced Department Manager based out of Visakhapatnam. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Asian Paints Signature Store:
Asian Paints Signature Store is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Asian Paints Signature Store!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
